steps.title: Fastest path: mark the figure first
steps.content: Mark the given angle relationships on the figure first: equal angles, vertical angles, supplementary angles, parallel-line angles, and triangle sums of $180^\circ$. Most of these questions become a short angle chase once the givens are marked.

steps.title: Write the obtuse angle
steps.content: An acute angle and an adjacent obtuse angle formed by a transversal are supplementary. If the acute angle is $(9x-560)^\circ$, then each obtuse angle is $$180-(9x-560)=740-9x.$$

steps.title: Add one acute and three obtuse angles
Match the given form
steps.content: The sum is given as $(-18x+w)^\circ$, so $w=1660$. The answer is 1660.
